title: agropyron violaceum subsp. andinum
intro: Agropyron violaceum subsp. andinum, also known as Andean wheat grass, is a subspecies of the Agropyron violaceum plant, a type of grass native to the Andean region of South America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Andean wheat grass include reducing inflammation and improving overall health, as well as its potential to help lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Andean wheat grass is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
